name: 3'x4' Christmas Indoor/Outdoor Lighted Inflatable Penguin in Puffer Jacket - Wondershop™
description:
This 3-Foot x 4-Foot Inflatable Christmas Inflatable Decoration from Wondershop™ is ready to spread winter cheer. This inflatable decoration showcases a black-and-white penguin with a yellow beak standing on its yellow feet. It also sports a red hat and a bright blue puffer jacket to lend extra seasonal joy to your décor. Including two stakes and two tiedowns for easy setup, this Christmas decoration features a plug-in design.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
